Planning comments

44 Bennerley Road SW11 6DS

This page allows you to comment on an application that is currently in progress.

Planning case:  2025/0555

  • Final Decision
Details acoustic assessment conditions 5 of planning permission dated 30/08/2024 ref 2024/2219 (Alterations including erection of roof extension above two storey back addition, installation of replacement timber framed sash windows and installation



This application is closed and the Council is no longer accepting comments.
